articles.title: OpenClaw — 360° Intelligence Briefing
articles.excerpt: An open-source autonomous AI agent OS created by Peter Steinberger . Started as "Clawdbot" , renamed to OpenClaw . Now run by an independent foundation after Steinberger was hired by OpenAI .

articles.title: OpenClaw: Business & Money Report
articles.excerpt: - Previous company: Co-founded and was CEO of PSPDFKit, a PDF SDK company that received a €100M+ strategic growth investment from Insight Partners in September 2021. PSPDFKit later rebranded as Nutrie...
